name: @repo/api-client
description: Shared typed API client (React Query hooks over a custom fetch mutator), generated from the backend's OpenAPI schema via orval. Consumed by web and mobile.
//exports: Bundler-only package: dist/ uses extensionless relative imports (no NodeNext-style .js suffixes), so it resolves under Vite/Metro/webpack but not Node's own ESM loader. See README's "Bundler-only package" note.
